name: Late Rent Copilot
description: Accounting drafts late-rent reminders from delinquency data, with approval before any resident-facing send.

stages.name: Import Delinquency Data
stages.description: Load the current delinquency batch and normalize tenants, units, balances, and due dates.

steps.title: Parse delinquency report
steps.instructions: Parse the delinquency report into tenant balance rows. Flag rows missing tenant, unit, balance, or contact data.
steps.dispatch_title: Parse delinquency report for late-rent workflow
steps.dispatch_body: Parse the current delinquency source into normalized rows. Return exceptions separately; do not send messages.

steps.title: Review data exceptions
steps.instructions: Review any missing balances, bad phone/email values, or tenant identity conflicts before drafts are generated.
steps.human_prompt: Review late-rent data exceptions before Accounting drafts reminders.

stages.name: Draft Reminder Queue
stages.description: Create draft reminders in copilot mode.

steps.title: Draft tenant reminders
steps.instructions: Draft one reminder per eligible tenant. Include amount, payment path, and a neutral tone. Do not send.
steps.dispatch_body: Create draft reminders only. Every resident-facing send remains approval-gated.

steps.title: Approve reminder queue
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or reject the reminder queue. No resident-facing sends before this gate is complete.
steps.human_prompt: Approve the late-rent reminder queue before any send.

stages.name: Release And Track
stages.description: Queue approved outreach and monitor exceptions.

steps.title: Queue approved reminders
steps.instructions: Queue only approved reminders. Respect send-mode and approval controls.
steps.dispatch_body: Queue approved late-rent reminders only; do not bypass send-mode or approval controls.

steps.title: Track resident responses
steps.instructions: Track payment promises, disputes, wrong contacts, and no-response cases into the cockpit.
steps.dispatch_body: Summarize responses and exceptions from the approved reminder batch.
